content.divergence_summary: Both branches eat well from post-storm emergence, but the shape of the day differs. Main stops at the root cross and eats — efficient, passive, the place does the work. Alt1-on-time eats while moving, finishing a job the storm interrupted — food and map progress happen simultaneously in the infrastructure already built.
content.branch_a_path: YY eats from root cross bark emergence without ranging; east channel cleared in the afternoon; day quiet and productive
content.branch_b_path: YY eats from corridor dead wood while completing the interrupted mapping run; western boundary now fully measured; hazelnut untouched; corridor delivers food and cartography on the same morning
key_differences: main food gain (0.47→0.58) comes from staying still; alt1-on-time food gain (0.54→0.65) comes from moving through productive infrastructure
alt1-on-time completes the western boundary map today — a milestone main has no equivalent of
alt1-on-time hazelnut remains inventory for the ninth consecutive day — its status as evidence rather than supply continues to hold
both recover health slightly; both attention softens from a well-fed day
shared_elements: same post-storm emergence event provides the food
both eat from bark and dead wood surfaces without long ranging runs
both recover health slightly from the previous storm day
